summary: Draft match-progress PR touching 39 files across fighter, stage, item, game-mode, library, menu/player, and toy code. The PR body claimed 32 functions at 100%, 11 failed attempts, and 1 pending function; a later issue comment says the work was split into themed PRs #2341, #2342, #2343, and #2344, with fn_80200460 excluded as a 98.2% match.

key_files.role: Implemented fn_800DA1D8 grab-hold/catch-wait transition body; uses Fighter_GObj/Fighter fields, callbacks, effect spawn, and PAD_STACK.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: matched fn_800DA1D8 ✓ 100%; grab hold state description

key_files.role: Updated fn_800DA1D8 prototype from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void fn_800DA1D8(Fighter_GObj*).
Implemented ftCh_Damage2_Anim and added mp/mplib.h include for mpFloorGetRight.
Implemented ftKb_SpecialN_800EF35C for Kirby copy hat material animation traversal; added ftanim include.
Updated ftKb_SpecialN_800EF35C return type to void.
Implemented Kirby neutral-special drink/eat animation callbacks and added required throw/thrown/ftanim includes.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: matched three ftKb_SpecialN drink functions ✓ 100%

key_files.role: Implemented ftKb_PrSpecialAirNStart_Anim for copied Jigglypuff Rollout air startup transition.
Implemented Kirby copied Sheik IASA loop handlers and copied Mewtwo neutral-special start transition helper/body; added forward declarations.
Implemented Ice Climbers aerial Belay throw animation callback.
Implemented ftCo_800C0134 fighter color overlay reset/reapply logic under scoped pragmas.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftCo_800C0134 body with pragma push/pop, auto_inline off, global_optimizer off

Implemented grCorneria_801DDDA8 Corneria world-space point calculation; diff excerpt shows temporary local structs/externs.
Header touched for Corneria function surface.

Added Kongo static declarations or local surface entries.
Implemented Dream Land wind animation variant selection function.
Implemented Rainbow Cruise initialization/callback functions; later issue comment says fn_80200460 was excluded as 98.2% match.

what_changed: Replaced numerous decomp placeholder comments with C function bodies across fighter, stage, item, game-mode, library, menu/player, and toy subsystems.
Updated several headers from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS or incorrect return types to concrete signatures where bodies or callsites in the PR required them.
Added includes needed by recovered bodies, including ftanim, ftCo_Throw, ftCo_ThrownKirby, mp/mplib, and baselib/aobj.h in shown excerpts.
Used matching tactics in some bodies, including PAD_STACK and a scoped pragma block around ftCo_800C0134.

The PR was closed unmerged and split into themed follow-up PRs: stages #2341, items #2342, Kirby #2343, and misc #2344; fn_80200460 was specifically excluded as 98.2% rather than accepted as a full match.

smart_moves.text: Kept function signatures synchronized with recovered bodies by updating touched headers, e.g. fn_800DA1D8(Fighter_GObj*), ftKb_SpecialN_800EF35C(...), and fn_8017F1B8(void).
Large mixed match set was later split into themed PRs, reducing review scope by subsystem.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text issue comment: Split into themed PRs #2341, #2342, #2343, #2344

smart_moves.text: The later comment corrected the earlier PR-body claim for fn_80200460 by excluding it as only a 98.2% match.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a placeholder function is recovered, update the owning header prototype in the same change instead of leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_800DA1D8 body plus ftCo_Attack100.h prototype update
raw_diff: fn_8017F1B8 body plus gmregclear.h prototype update

decomp_lessons.lesson: Treat broad multi-subsystem match dumps as candidates for themed split PRs when review scope becomes too wide.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: 39 changed files across many subsystems
issue_comment: Split into themed PRs #2341 stages, #2342 items, #2343 Kirby, #2344 misc

decomp_lessons.lesson: Do not rely only on an initial matched table when later PR discussion revises a match claim; preserve the correction in intake.

naming_conventions.convention: Address-style fn_ names were retained for functions without proven semantic names, e.g. fn_800DA1D8, fn_8017F1B8, fn_8001F06C, and fn_80200460.
Subsystem-prefixed semantic names were used where already present, such as ftKb_*, grCorneria_*, grKongo_*, itKamex_*, and mnName_*.
Common local role names appear in excerpts, including gobj, fp, jobj, attrs, da, and item_gobj.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK was used narrowly in several recovered functions to influence stack/codegen shape.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Loaded standards require explicit verifier evidence for PAD_STACK; the PR body claims 100% matches but no objdiff/build transcript is included in this slice.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Scoped pragmas were used around ftCo_800C0134: pragma push, auto_inline off, global_optimizer off, then pop.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Loaded standards treat pragmas/global_optimizer off as exceptional and evidence-requiring; no adjacent-function verification is included in this slice.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Some bodies use small temporary local structs or casts to model data layout, e.g. Kirby costume_data in ftKb_SpecialN_800EF35C and Corneria grCn_Data/grCn_Entry excerpt.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: These are evidence of tactics used in the PR, not proof that the temporary type shapes were accepted upstream.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Natural loops appear in recovered code where the operation iterates fixed ranges or data trees, e.g. gmregclear loops over 256 entries and Kirby hat material animation walks matanimjoint until NULL.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: for (i = 0; i < 256; i++) in fn_8017F1B8
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The slice supports that loops were used, but does not include comparative failed unrolled attempts.

notes: The PR body claims 32 matched at 100%, but the slice does not include objdiff/checkdiff/build logs for each claim.
The raw diff is truncated in loaded_files, so some changed files are represented by metadata and PR body descriptions rather than exact diff bodies.
The PR was a draft, closed, and not merged in this slice; do not treat these changes as accepted upstream facts.
A later issue comment conflicts with the initial matched table for fn_80200460, stating it was excluded as a 98.2% match.
No review comments or formal reviewer approvals are present.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Split broad match-progress dumps into themed subsystem PRs
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2335 touched 39 files across many systems and was later split into themed PRs: #2341 stages, #2342 items, #2343 Kirby, and #2344 misc.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment: split into themed PRs

accepted_candidate_records.title: Later PR comments can supersede initial match tables
accepted_candidate_records.text: The initial PR body listed fn_80200460 as 100%, but the later issue comment says fn_80200460 was excluded as a 98.2% match.

source_update_candidates.title: Consider a review-scope/process note for large multi-subsystem match PRs
source_update_candidates.text: When a match-progress PR spans many subsystems, prefer splitting into themed PRs for review. PR #2335 was closed and split into #2341 stages, #2342 items, #2343 Kirby, and #2344 misc.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment: split into themed PRs
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR provides concrete historical evidence for a process convention, but this is not currently one of the loaded global decomp standards and should be curated before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: Record match-status corrections when later comments revise generated PR summaries
source_update_candidates.text: Do not preserve an initial generated match table as authoritative when a later author comment corrects it; in PR #2335 fn_80200460 was initially listed as 100% but later excluded as 98.2%.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful curation/intake rule supported by this PR, but it belongs in source-owned guidance only after curator review.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the PR body's 32 matched claims as validated accepted matches without per-function objdiff/checkdiff/build evidence.
Do not treat fn_80200460 as matched; the later issue comment says it was excluded at 98.2%.
Do not infer reviewer intent or acceptance status; no review comments or approvals are present.
Do not turn the PAD_STACK or pragma usage in this PR into a general style recommendation; loaded standards require explicit verification evidence and this slice lacks that transcript.
Do not promote temporary structs or local extern patterns from truncated excerpts as accepted data-layout facts.
